name: cleanpaste
description: Automatically cleans pasted content from MS Office, Google Docs and other external sources

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/cleanpaste/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/cleanpaste/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/cleanpaste/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/cleanpaste/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
